dashboard.medical_processing_tip_3: Higher text quality yields better board-style questions
dashboard.medical_processing_tip_4: Medical terminology is preserved and emphasized

informational.complete_guide: Your complete guide to AI-powered document processing and learning
informational.contact_support: If you have questions or need assistance, don't hesitate to reach out to our support team.
informational.quick_start_desc: Upload a document and follow the prompts
informational.experiment_desc: Try different study modes and settings
informational.organize_desc: Use folders and tags in your library
informational.overview_text: MeshFahem is an AI-powered learning platform that transforms your documents and text into intelligent summaries and interactive flashcards. Whether you're studying for exams, reviewing meeting notes, or processing research materials, MeshFahem helps you extract key information and create effective study materials.
informational.smart_summaries_desc: AI-generated bullet-point summaries that capture the most important information from your content.
informational.interactive_flashcards_desc: Multiple study modes including flip cards, type answers, multiple choice, fill-in-the-blanks, and true/false questions.
informational.multi_language_desc: Translate your content into different languages and switch between them seamlessly.
informational.upload_methods_intro: You can process content in two ways:
informational.file_upload_drag_drop: Drag & drop or click to browse
informational.text_input_perfect_for: Perfect for articles, notes, and web content
informational.generation_source_full: Full Content: Generate flashcards from the entire document
informational.generation_source_summary: Summary: Generate flashcards only from the key points
informational.fast_mode_desc: For smaller documents and faster results
informational.staged_mode_desc: For larger documents with batch processing
informational.summary_copy_all: Copy All: Copy the entire summary to clipboard
informational.summary_dual_mode: Dual-mode: Switch between summary and original text
informational.summary_export: Export: Download as TXT or PDF
informational.summary_publish: Publish to Library: Save permanently to your collection
informational.summary_new_doc: New Document: Start a fresh processing session
informational.summary_translation: Language Translation: Convert to different languages
informational.flip_cards_desc: Click to reveal answers and rate your understanding
informational.type_answer_desc: Type your answer and get instant feedback
informational.multiple_choice_desc: Choose from 4 options with immediate results
informational.fill_blanks_desc: Complete sentences by filling in missing words
informational.view_all_desc: See all flashcards at once for quick review
informational.export_csv_desc: CSV Format: Import into other study apps
informational.export_txt_desc: TXT Format: Plain text for easy sharing
informational.translation_tip_1: Select your preferred language from the dropdown
informational.translation_tip_2: Content is intelligently translated while maintaining context
informational.translation_tip_3: Both summaries and flashcards adapt to the new language
informational.translation_tip_4: Switch between languages anytime during your session
informational.my_library_desc: Your permanent collection of processed content with advanced organization features.
informational.library_org_1: Create folders to categorize your content
informational.library_org_2: Add tags for easy searching and filtering
informational.library_org_3: View full content including original text
informational.library_share_1: Generate public share links for any item
informational.library_share_2: Share summaries and flashcards with others
informational.library_share_4: Shared content works across all languages
informational.history_desc_long: Temporary storage of your recent processing sessions.
informational.history_stored_1: Original file names and processing dates
informational.history_retention_2: Save important items to your library before they expire
informational.history_retention_3: View and re-study any historical session
informational.usage_limit: Standard plan: 1,500 tools & services credits per billing cycle
informational.account_info_1: View your profile information and settings
informational.account_info_2: Sign out securely from your account
informational.better_summaries_2: Ensure text is readable and not image-based
informational.better_summaries_4: Choose appropriate flashcard counts for your content length
informational.effective_study_1: Start with flip cards to get familiar with the content
informational.effective_study_2: Use type answer mode for active recall practice
informational.effective_study_3: Try multiple choice for quick self-assessment
informational.effective_study_4: Organize content in your library with folders and tags
informational.medical_student_intro: Use this when processing medical textbooks, clinical notes, or healthcare education materials for stronger terminology handling and clinical emphasis.
informational.medical_student_bullet_1: Medical content validation: detects and checks medical terminology
informational.medical_student_bullet_2: Clinical focus: flashcards emphasize diagnoses, treatments, and correlations
informational.medical_student_bullet_3: Summaries highlight key medical concepts and context
informational.medical_student_bullet_4: Topic detection for specialties (e.g. cardiology, neurology)
informational.tips_medical_1: Turn on Medical Mode for healthcare-related content
informational.tips_medical_2: Works best with textbooks, clinical notes, and research papers
informational.tips_medical_4: Browse community medical content when available for peer learning
informational.whats_new_book_mode: Book mode: read summaries in a notebook-style layout with movable widgets (flashcards, notes).
informational.whats_new_academics: Academics hub: central place for study tools aligned with your workflow.
informational.whats_new_study_rooms: Study rooms: live collaboration; minute-based credits when you add the study-room pack.
informational.whats_new_chat: Global chat assistant: context-aware help across the app; optional AI token add-ons on Standard.
informational.whats_new_library: Library: dedicated content view, topics & tags filters, and improved mobile layout.
informational.whats_new_themes: New color themes (Slate Mist, Plum Sand) and refreshed defaults—Cool Neutrals and Soft Minimal were retired.
informational.whats_new_standard: Standard plan: 1,500 tools & services credits per cycle (overage can appear as e.g. 2,700 / 1,500).

steps.title: Welcome to Your Dashboard
steps.content: Welcome! This is your main workspace where you can process documents, generate summaries, and create flashcards. Let's explore the key features.

steps.title: Upload Documents
steps.content: Click "Upload File" to process PDF, DOCX, or PPTX files. Supported files up to 400 pages. Your document will be converted into summaries and flashcards.

steps.title: Paste Text Directly
steps.content: Alternatively, you can paste text directly into the text area. This is perfect for quick summaries of notes, articles, or any text content.

steps.title: Processing Options
steps.content: Before processing, you can customize: Flashcard count (5-50), Medical mode for medical content, and Language selection for translations.

steps.title: View Your Results
steps.content: After processing, you'll see your summary and flashcards. You can view flashcards, publish to your library, or start over with new content.

steps.title: Navigation Sidebar
steps.content: Use the sidebar on the left to navigate between pages: Library, Quiz, EduPlay, Study Rooms, History, and more. Hover to expand or click to navigate.

steps.title: AI Chatbot Assistant
steps.content: Look for the floating AI assistant button. It provides context-aware help based on your current content. Drag it around and resize it to your preference.

steps.title: Credits System
steps.content: Your credit balance is shown in the header. Credits are used for processing content and AI features. Credits refresh monthly based on your subscription.

steps.title: You're All Set!
steps.content: You now know the basics! Start by uploading a document or pasting text to create your first summary and flashcards. Happy studying!

steps.title: Your Content Library
steps.content: Your Library stores all your processed summaries and flashcards. Everything you publish from the Dashboard is saved here for easy access.

steps.title: Search Your Library
steps.content: Use the search icon in the top right to find specific content. Click it to expand the search bar, then type keywords to filter your library items.

steps.title: Filter and Sort
steps.content: Use the filter dropdown to sort by: Date, Title, Most Liked, or Topics. This helps you quickly find the content you need.

steps.title: View Content Details
steps.content: Click on any library item to view its full summary, flashcards, original text, and topics. You can also edit, share, or delete items from here.

steps.title: Organize Your Content
steps.content: Use folders and tags to organize your library. Create folders for different subjects or topics to keep your content well-organized.

steps.title: Share Content
steps.content: Share your summaries with others by generating shareable links. Others can view your content without needing an account.

steps.title: Library Actions
steps.content: Each item has action buttons: View, Edit, Share, Delete. Use these to manage your library content efficiently.

steps.title: You're Ready!
steps.content: Your library is your knowledge base. Keep it organized and use search to quickly find what you need. Happy studying!

steps.title: Create Quizzes from Your Content
steps.content: The Quiz page lets you create and take quizzes from your processed content. Test your knowledge and track your progress.

steps.title: Choose Question Source
steps.content: Select where to get questions from: Your Library (saved content), Your History (recent processing), or create questions manually.

steps.title: AI Question Generation
steps.content: Click "Generate Questions" to create AI-powered questions from your content. Choose difficulty level and question types (multiple choice, true/false, etc.).

steps.title: Take a Quiz
steps.content: Select a quiz from your folders and click "Start Quiz". Answer questions within the time limit and track your score in real-time.

steps.title: View Quiz Results
steps.content: After completing a quiz, review your results: correct answers, incorrect answers, time taken, and overall score. Learn from your mistakes.

steps.title: Organize Quiz Folders
steps.content: Create folders to organize your quizzes by subject or topic. This makes it easy to find and manage your quiz collection.

steps.title: Quiz Settings
steps.content: Customize quiz settings: time limits, question count, difficulty level, and more. Adjust these to match your study preferences.

steps.title: You're Ready!
steps.content: Start creating quizzes from your content to test your knowledge. Regular practice with quizzes helps reinforce what you've learned!

steps.title: Educational Games
steps.content: EduPlay offers interactive educational games to make learning fun. Play solo or compete with others in multiplayer games.

steps.title: Brain Rush Game
steps.content: Brain Rush is a fast-paced quiz game. Answer questions quickly to score points. The faster you answer correctly, the higher your score.

steps.title: Game Setup
steps.content: Before starting, choose your question source (Library or History), set difficulty level, and configure time limits. Customize the game to your preference.

steps.title: Multiplayer Games
steps.content: Join or create multiplayer game sessions. Compete with friends or other users in real-time. See leaderboards and track your rankings.

steps.title: Game Results
steps.content: After each game, view your results: score, accuracy, time taken, and ranking. Review questions you got wrong to improve.

steps.title: You're Ready!
steps.content: Start playing Brain Rush to make learning engaging and competitive. Challenge yourself and others to improve your knowledge!

steps.title: Collaborative Study Spaces
steps.content: Study Rooms let you study together with others in real-time. Create or join rooms to collaborate on learning materials.

steps.title: Joining Rooms
steps.content: Browse available public rooms or join private rooms using a room code. Filter rooms by subject, topic, or number of participants.

steps.title: Creating Rooms
steps.content: Click "Create Room" to start your own study room. Set the room name, description, privacy settings, and choose study materials.

steps.title: Collaboration Features
steps.content: In a study room, you can share content, discuss topics, and work together on flashcards or quizzes. Real-time updates keep everyone in sync.

steps.title: Room Management
steps.content: As a room creator, you can manage participants, change settings, and control room content. Leave rooms anytime or delete rooms you created.

steps.title: You're Ready!
steps.content: Start collaborating! Create a room for your study group or join existing rooms to learn together with others.

steps.title: Your Processing History
steps.content: The History page shows all your past document processing and content generation. Everything you've processed is saved here.

steps.title: Viewing History
steps.content: Browse through your processing history chronologically. Each entry shows the file name, processing date, and content type (summary, flashcards, etc.).

steps.title: Revisiting Content
steps.content: Click on any history item to view its summary, flashcards, and original text. You can republish items to your library or reprocess them.

steps.title: History Actions
steps.content: From history items, you can: View full content, Publish to library, Delete old entries, or Export content. Manage your history efficiently.

steps.title: You're Ready!
steps.content: Use History to revisit past processing and keep track of all your learning materials. Nothing is lost!

steps.title: Help Resources
steps.content: This page contains helpful information about using the app. Find guides, tips, and answers to common questions.

steps.title: Finding Information
steps.content: Browse through different topics and categories to find the information you need. Use the search function to quickly locate specific topics.

steps.title: You're Ready!
steps.content: Refer to this page anytime you need help or want to learn more about app features. We're here to help!

steps.title: Share Your Thoughts
steps.content: Your feedback helps us improve! Share your thoughts, report issues, or suggest new features. We value your input.

steps.title: Submitting Feedback
steps.content: Fill out the feedback form with your message, select the feedback type (bug report, feature request, general feedback), and submit.

steps.title: Feature Requests
steps.content: Have an idea for a new feature? Submit it here! You can also vote on existing feature requests from other users.

steps.title: You're Ready!
steps.content: We appreciate your feedback! Your suggestions help make the app better for everyone. Thank you!

steps.title: Your Profile
steps.content: Manage your account settings, preferences, and subscription from your Profile page. Customize your experience here.

steps.title: Account Settings
steps.content: Update your profile information, email address, and password. Keep your account secure and up-to-date.

steps.title: Preferences
steps.content: Customize your experience: Choose color themes, set language preferences, and configure sidebar behavior (collapsible or pinnable).

steps.title: Subscription Management
steps.content: View your subscription status, billing information, and upgrade options. Manage your subscription and payment methods here.

steps.title: Credits & Usage
steps.content: Monitor your credit balance, usage statistics, and credit history. See when your credits will refresh and track your usage.

steps.title: You're Ready!
steps.content: Your profile is your control center. Customize settings to match your preferences and manage your account easily.

steps.title: Your study hub
steps.content: Academics is where you organize courses, turn documents into study tools, and see simple progress by topic.

steps.title: Create courses
steps.content: Use Create course to add a name, optional course code, and a topic. You can pick an existing shared topic or type a new one.

steps.title: Generate from uploads
steps.content: Inside a course, upload a PDF, DOCX, or PPTX. The app can generate summary, flashcards, and a linked quiz from the same text.

steps.title: Analytics
steps.content: Topic scores combine quiz performance with flashcard study signals. Course score focuses on quizzes linked to that course.

steps.title: You're set
steps.content: Start by creating a course, then upload material when you are ready to build structured study tools.
